cases.name: card_long_title_rtl

hidden_content.title: דוח ביצועים רבעוני עם כותרת ארוכה במיוחד שנועדה לבדוק חיתוך
hidden_content.body: RTL body content should preserve card padding and grid placement.

reference_assertions: title wraps to at most two lines before ellipsis
card padding remains 16px on all sides
button still uses primary accent styling

cases.name: empty_state_disabled_button
reference_assertions: empty body does not collapse card below padding minimum
disabled button uses border-color background, not accent background
